content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's not conventionally handsome — gangly, glasses, that perpetual bedhead — but there's something about his hands on a guitar and the way he closes his eyes when he plays that makes you forget all of it. He's a better musician than he thinks; his chord progressions are intuitive and honest in a way you can't teach. He's gentle and careful, maybe too careful — I sense he's holding something back, not just from me but from himself. We're rooftop music partners, maybe friends. I think he sees me as a fellow quiet person who doesn't require him to perform. I know his startup is in trouble. I know he plays original songs he never shows anyone. I've heard him hum a melody that sounded like it was about someone specific, and I've never asked who.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's not conventionally handsome — gangly, glasses, that perpetual bedhead — but there's something about his hands on a guitar and the way he closes his eyes when he plays that makes you forget all of it. He's a better musician than he thinks; his chord progressions are intuitive and honest in a way you can't teach. He's gentle and careful, maybe too careful — I sense he's holding something back, not just from me but from himself. We're rooftop music partners, maybe friends. I think he sees me as a fellow quiet person who doesn't require him to perform. I know his startup is in trouble. I know he plays original songs he never shows anyone. I've heard him hum a melody that sounded like it was about someone specific, and I've never asked who.
